title: Consolidated theming pipeline
description: Unify theme system across all UI components. Create theme provider, CSS variable tokens, and theme switcher. Support light/dark/high-contrast modes.

title: Parity-ready dashboards
description: Create unified dashboard layout with consistent spacing, typography, and component patterns. Align with AgentZero visual parity.

title: Improved memory/streaming panels
description: Enhance Memory and Streaming panels with better visual hierarchy, loading states, error handling, and responsive design.

title: Accessibility improvements
description: Add ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management, and screen reader support. Run axe-core accessibility audit.

title: UX polish and animations
description: Add smooth transitions, loading skeletons, hover effects, and micro-interactions. Ensure 60fps animations.

title: Create Phase 6 runbook
description: Create runbook for UI incident response: theme issues, accessibility failures, performance regressions. Include debug commands.

title: Update parity scorecard for UI axis
description: Fill in parity scorecard for UI axis: feature coverage, quality, observability, evidence. Mark status as completed.

title: Phase 6 gate review
description: Run gate review against criteria 6.1-6.5. Document results in phase6_gating.md. Get sign-off to proceed to Phase 7.
